text: The broader technology sector experienced volatility in early February 2026, with the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500 logging their worst day in two weeks amid an AI-fueled sell-off. Investors rotated away from AI-focused stocks toward safer investments following sector-wide losses. Despite this market malaise, Alphabet's stock demonstrated resilience with a 30-day price return of 7.79%, significantly outperforming the S&P 500 benchmark return of 0.93% over the same period.
